title: Data Analyst Intern
description: Analyze datasets using Python and SQL. Support the data team with ad-hoc reporting and dashboard creation in Excel.

title: Software Engineering Intern
description: Work on scalable backend systems. Write clean code in Python and Java. Collaborate via Git.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Build interactive user interfaces using React.js. Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability.

title: Backend Developer
description: Design and build scalable APIs with Django. Manage containerized deployments via Docker on AWS.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Develop and deploy predictive models. Work with deep neural networks using TensorFlow.

title: Data Scientist
description: Perform A/B testing, statistical modeling, and extract insights from large datasets.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Automate deployment pipelines. Manage infrastructure as code. Ensure high availability of services.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Design intuitive user flows and create high-fidelity prototypes on Figma.

title: Software Developer Intern
description: Solve complex algorithmic challenges. Write performant C++ code for embedded systems.

title: Cloud Architect
description: Design highly available and scalable cloud-native architectures.

title: Product Analyst
description: Work closely with product managers to define KPIs and build dashboards in Tableau.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Develop and maintain web applications using the MERN stack.

title: Cybersecurity Intern
description: Assist in vulnerability assessments and penetration testing securely.

title: Database Administrator
description: Manage and optimize PostgreSQL databases for high performance and reliability.

title: Quantitative Researcher
description: Research and implement complex mathematical models for trading strategies.

title: Mobile App Developer
description: Develop dynamic cross-platform mobile applications.

title: QA Engineer Intern
description: Write automated test scripts using Selenium and document software bugs.

title: Data Engineering Intern
description: Build ETL pipelines and work with big data frameworks like Apache Spark.

title: System Administrator
description: Maintain internal IT infrastructure and troubleshoot network issues.

title: NLP Engineer
description: Develop natural language processing solutions. Train language models using PyTorch.
